## Summary

- 

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature (`feature/*`)
- [ ] Fix (`fix/*`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/*`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore/*`)
- [ ] Release (`release/*`)
- [ ] Hotfix (`hotfix/*`)

## Testing

- [ ] `Scripts/run_self_tests.sh`
- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] Manual UI check, if applicable

## Versioning

- [ ] No version bump needed
- [ ] Patch bump
- [ ] Minor bump
- [ ] Major bump
- [ ] `VERSION`, `Support/Info.plist`, client info, and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated for release changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows [docs/BRANCHING.md](../docs/BRANCHING.md)
- [ ] Version policy follows [docs/VERSIONING.md](../docs/VERSIONING.md)
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior changes
- [ ] Screenshots are attached for visible UI changes, if useful
